CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "MLD - SYSTEMS MULTIMODE DETECTION") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "MLD - SYSTEMS MULTIMODE DETECTION") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "MLD - SYSTEMS MULTIMODE DETECTION"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "Multilabel Detection - MLD"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "MLD"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "17-MLD")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-MLD
